Class LoanItemPredicateFactory

java.lang.Object
ca.richasf.loanitemstracker.control.LoanItemPredicateFactory
public class LoanItemPredicateFactory extends Object
Constructs predicates on loan items.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    LoanItemPredicateFactory()
    Constructs a new predicate factory.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Predicate<LoanItem>
    all()
    Get a predicate that does allows all loan items.
    Predicate<LoanItem>
    overdue()
    Get a predicate that selects overdue items.
    Predicate<LoanItem>
    sameType(Class<? extends LoanItem> type)
    Get a predicate that selects the same type.
    Predicate<LoanItem>
    upcoming()
    Get a predicate that selects upcoming items.

  • Method Details

    • all

      public Predicate<LoanItem> all()
      Get a predicate that does allows all loan items.
      Returns:
      A predicate.

    • overdue

      public Predicate<LoanItem> overdue()
      Get a predicate that selects overdue items.
      Returns:
      A predicate.

    • upcoming

      public Predicate<LoanItem> upcoming()
      Get a predicate that selects upcoming items.
      Returns:
      A predicate.

    • sameType

      public Predicate<LoanItem> sameType(Class<? extends LoanItem> type)
      Get a predicate that selects the same type.
      Parameters:
      type - The type to select.
      Returns:
      A predicate.
